'''Corporate Alliance artillery regulars''' were mobile artillery employed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They employed a mobile track system similar to the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] [[NR-N99 Persuader-class droid enforcer/Legends|Tank Droids]].

They were amongst the donations of the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] to the war effort.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
